title: GoalMembershipBase
description: This object represents a user's connection to a goal.

gid.description: Globally unique identifier of the resource, as a string.

resource_type.description: The base type of this resource.

role.description: *Deprecated: Describes if the member is a commenter or editor in goal.*

access_level.description: Describes if member is commenter or editor in goal. This is preferred over role

allOf.description: *Deprecated: new integrations should prefer the `parent` field.* A *Goal* is an object in the goal-tracking system that helps your organization drive measurable results.
